title: acer laetum f. tricolor
intro: Acer laetum f. tricolor is a variant of the Acer laetum plant, specifically known for its unique tricolor foliage. This plant, which is also known as the Mapleleaf Viburnum or Mapleleaf Viburnum Tricolor, is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Acer laetum f. tricolor include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Acer laetum f. tricolor are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
